description: Registry of Google Sheets that Claude tracks and auto-updates through chat. See README.md for how this works.

sheets.title: CDL School Founder Text Tracker
sheets.purpose: Outreach tracker for CDL school founders: who got texted/called and how they responded.
sheets.update_rules: Match a person by Phone Number (or Name if no phone). When a founder replies, fill the Response column. Mark Text Sent / called with 'y' when done. Add a new row for any new contact.

sheets.title: Rosedale-Vendors
sheets.purpose: Vendor / sponsor contact list for the CDL school and Rosedale shop, with sponsorship angle and verification status.
sheets.update_rules: Match a vendor by Company. Update Status / Notes as contact is verified or cards are reshot. 'CHECK' means a field still needs confirming. Add a new row per new vendor.

sheets.title: Rosedale_Weekly_Briefing
sheets.purpose: One row per week: fleet idle %, MPG, and shop-tracker activity (reported down / scheduled / missed / fixed).
sheets.update_rules: Add a new row under the latest week every Sunday. Keep the TOTAL / AVG row at the bottom. NOTE: this file is an .xlsx upload, not a native Google Sheet, so the Sheets write actions can't edit it directly. Convert it to a Google Sheet first (open in Sheets > File > Save as Google Sheets) and update its id/format/url here, then it becomes editable.

ignored.title: JUNE OB SHEET
ignored.reason: Shared with you but owned by another person (hyndmankimberly3@gmail.com). Read-only by default — add to sheets[] only if you want Claude to edit it and you have write access.

ignored.title: Untitled spreadsheet
ignored.reason: Empty placeholder. Give it a name and purpose, then move it into sheets[].
